projectDescription: Claude Code workflow toolkit with AI agent skills and headless browser automation for engineering teams.
keyFeatures: Eight opinionated workflow skills as slash commands for Claude Code
Persistent headless browser with sub-second latency and session state
Ref-based element interaction system using accessibility tree
Automated QA testing with diff-aware mode for feature branches
Cookie import from real browsers (Chrome, Arc, Brave, Edge, Comet)
Greptile PR review integration with automatic triage
Multi-workspace support with isolated browser instances
Engineering retrospectives with team-aware metrics and feedback
publicApiSurface: /plan-ceo-review — Founder mode: rethink product direction and find the 10-star version
/plan-eng-review — Engineering manager mode: lock in architecture, diagrams, and edge cases
/review — Paranoid staff engineer mode: find bugs that pass CI but break production
/ship — Release engineer mode: sync, test, resolve reviews, push, and create PR
/browse — QA engineer mode: interact with live URLs via headless browser
/qa — QA lead mode: systematic testing with diff-aware, full, quick, and regression modes
/setup-browser-cookies — Import cookies from real browsers into headless session
/retro — Engineering manager mode: weekly retrospective with team metrics
$B goto <url> — Navigate to URL in headless browser
$B snapshot -i — Generate accessibility tree with @e refs for element selection
$B console — View console messages and errors
